# PR: Vaquill-AI/awesome-legaltech

## Category

Add under: `### Open Source Platforms` or `### MCP Servers` (they have MCP as a named category)

## PR Title

`feat: add ComplianceStack — open-source AI governance MCP server for legal compliance`

## PR Body

```markdown
### What

[ComplianceStack](https://github.com/nyayoshbharuchanb15-max/ComplianceStack) is an open-source MCP server that provides automated compliance auditing for AI systems against 5 regulatory frameworks:

- **EU AI Act** (Reg. 2024/1689) — Risk classification, human oversight, bias, adversarial robustness
- **GDPR** (Reg. 2016/679) — DPIA, ROPA, DSAR, cross-border transfer analysis
- **NIST AI RMF** (AI 100-1) — Risk mapping, governance, measurement, drift monitoring
- **ISO/IEC 42001:2023** — AIMS compliance, documented information
- **India DPDP Act 2023** — Consent, fiduciary duties, data principal rights

### Why it fits legal tech

- **Automates regulatory compliance** — Replaces manual GRC checklists with a 17-phase audit pipeline
- **Zero data egress** — All audits run on-premise, critical for client confidentiality
- **W3C Verifiable Credentials** — Cryptographically signed audit certificates for legal evidence
- **BLOCKER FAIL mechanism** — Prevents certification of non-compliant AI models
- **Covers the full AI Act lifecycle** — From risk classification (Art. 6) to adversarial testing (Art. 9) to human oversight (Art. 14)

### Install

```bash
npx compliance-stack-mcp-server
```

### Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/nyayoshbharuchanb15-max/ComplianceStack)
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/compliance-stack-mcp-server)
- [Documentation](https://github.com/nyayoshbharuchanb15-max/ComplianceStack#readme)
```
